name: python3-zlib-wrapper
title: python3-zlib-wrapper
summary: Wrapper around zlib with custom header crc32 (Python 3)
description:
Wrapper around zlib with custom header crc32 (Python 3)
This package contains a  very small library for building crc32 header on top
of zlib. Zlib performance on the highest compression is decent for the
benchmark, while not as optimized as 7z it was roughly half the time for all
in memory test.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zlib-wrapper because Wrapper around zlib with custom header crc32 (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zlib-wrapper as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zlib-wrapper with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zlib-wrapper --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
